chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4805 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 9th April 2024 Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Asst. A.G. Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Pursuant to Court’s Notice, Mr. Omer Pechuho, Advocate has shown appearance on behalf of the respondent No.2, who under instructions submits that there is no complaint filed by the respondent No.3 is pending against the petitioner, nor the respondents have taken any adverse action against the petitioner, therefore, the relief being sought through instant petition is misconceived. No one has shown appearance on behalf of the respondent No.2 inspite of Court’s Notice. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that in view of such statement made by learned counsel for the respondent No.2, petitioner does not want to press instant Constitution Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
